% ------------------------------------------------------------------------
    \begin{tasks}(2)
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                \dfrac{\simpup{121}{11}}{\simpdown*{-8}{-1}}
                \cdot
                \dfrac{\simpup*{72}{9}}{\simpdown{11}{1}}
                 & = -99
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                \dfrac{-1}{3}+\dfrac{3}{4} & = \dfrac{-4}{12} + \dfrac{9}{12} \\
                                           & = \dfrac{5}{12}
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                \dfrac{\simpup{3}{1}}{\simpdown*{7}{1}}
                \cdot
                \dfrac{\simpup*{35}{5}}{\simpdown{9}{3}}
                 & = \dfrac{5}{3}
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                \dfrac{7}{2}+\dfrac{1}{8}-\dfrac{-4}{-12}
                 & = \dfrac{7}{2} + \dfrac{1}{8}
                - \dfrac{\simpup{4}{1}}{\simpdown{12}{3}}           \\
                 & = \dfrac{84}{24} + \dfrac{3}{24} - \dfrac{8}{24} \\
                 & = \dfrac{79}{24}
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                \dfrac{11}{14} - \dfrac{3}{-21}
                 & = \dfrac{11}{14} + \dfrac{\simpup{3}{1}}{\simpdown{21}{7}} \\
                 & = \dfrac{11}{14} + \dfrac{2}{14}                           \\
                 & = \dfrac{13}{14}
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                -\dfrac{-2}{18}+\dfrac{-6}{-27}
                 & = \dfrac{\simpup{2}{1}}{\simpdown{18}{9}} + \dfrac{6}{27} \\
                 & = \dfrac{3}{27} + \dfrac{6}{27}                           \\
                 & = -\dfrac{\simpup{9}{1}}{\simpdown{27}{3}}
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                \dfrac{-35}{24}\cdot \dfrac{-8}{9} \cdot \dfrac{-6}{25}
                 & =
                -\dfrac{\simpup{35}{7}}{\simpdown*{24}{4}}\cdot \dfrac{8}{9}
                \cdot \dfrac{\simpup*{6}{1}}{\simpdown{25}{5}}                \\
                 & = -\dfrac{7}{\simpdown{4}{1}}\cdot\dfrac{\simpup{8}{2}}{9}
                \cdot\dfrac{1}{5}                                             \\
                 & = -\dfrac{14}{45}
            \end{aligned}$
        \task!
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                \left(\dfrac{1}{2}+\dfrac{3}{4}\right)
                \cdot
                \left(\dfrac{1}{5}+\dfrac{3}{10}\right)
                 & =
                \left(\dfrac{2}{4}+\dfrac{3}{4}\right)
                \cdot
                \left(\dfrac{2}{10}+\dfrac{3}{10}\right)                        \\
                 & = \dfrac{5}{4} \cdot \dfrac{\simpup{5}{1}}{\simpdown{10}{2}} \\
                 & = \dfrac{5}{8}
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                \dfrac{2}{15}-\dfrac{2}{3}:\dfrac{1}{4}
                 & = \dfrac{2}{15} - \dfrac{2}{3} \cdot \dfrac{4}{1} \\
                 & = \dfrac{2}{15} - \dfrac{8}{3}                    \\
                 & = \dfrac{2}{15} - \dfrac{40}{15}                  \\
                 & = -\dfrac{38}{15}
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                \dfrac{3}{5}\cdot \left(\dfrac{-2}{3}\right)^2
                 & = \dfrac{3}{5}\cdot\dfrac{(-2)^2}{3^2}                    \\
                 & = \dfrac{\simpup{3}{1}}{5}\cdot\dfrac{4}{\simpdown{9}{3}} \\
                 & = \dfrac{4}{15}
            \end{aligned}$
    \end{tasks}
